---
title: "Campaign Performance Dashboard"
image: "https://placehold.co/600x400?text=Social+Media+Analysis"
categories: [Dashboard, Data Visualization, Marketing Analytics]
index: 5
---

#### **Overview**  
Built an interactive dashboard to track campaign performance metrics, identify trends, and support data-driven marketing decisions across channels.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Learning Outcomes**  
- Built a dashboard to track campaign performance metrics  
- Integrated data across multiple marketing channels  
- Analyzed trends in CTR, conversion rate, and ROI  
- Designed visualizations for stakeholder reporting  
- Enabled real-time performance monitoring  
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Key Skills Gained**  
- Identified high- and low-performing campaigns  
- Revealed trends across channels and audience segments  
- Improved visibility into marketing performance  
- Supported faster, data-driven decision-making  
- Enhanced reporting for stakeholders  
:::
:::
